retrieved_kb_context:
## Retrieved KB Context for LLM Planning
Use these similar projects as calibration signals for task scope, FR/NFR classification, complexity levels, and dependency hints. Do not copy tasks unless they are implied by the new requirements.
Hard constraints for this run: emit one task per requirement line, do not merge repeated source lines, keep security/performance/compliance/availability/mobile/localization/privacy constraints as NFRs, and keep titles action-oriented (Implement/Integrate for FR; Enforce/Optimize/Enable for NFR).

### EDUCATION project, critic_score=0.89:
  - Implement Course Enrollment and Waitlist (FR, C3)
  - Implement Schedule Builder with Conflict Detection (FR, C4)
  - Implement Fee Payment Gateway (FR, C4)
  - Implement Transcript Request Workflow (FR, C3)
  - Implement Student Self-Service Portal (FR, C3)
  - Implement Faculty Load Management (FR, C3)
  - Multi-Language Support Arabic and English NFR (NFR, C3)
  - High Concurrency During Registration Period NFR (NFR, C4)

### EDUCATION project, critic_score=0.91:
  - Implement Course Enrollment (FR, C3)
  - Implement Schedule Conflict Detection (FR, C4)
  - Integrate Tuition Payment Gateway (FR, C4)
  - Implement Transcript Request Workflow (FR, C3)
  - Implement Advisor Approval Workflow (FR, C3)
  - Implement Student Notification Center (FR, C3)
  - Arabic and English Localization NFR (NFR, C3)
  - Registration Peak Load NFR (NFR, C4)

Apply similar FR/NFR classification and complexity levels to the new requirements below, while preserving exact source references and the one-line-to-one-task mapping.

high_complexity_tasks.title: Optimize system uptime and reliability constraints

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should Register and enroll in available courses.
The system should Upload grades and course materials.
The system should Generate tuition invoices and process online payments.
The system should Send automated email notifications for deadlines.
The system should maintain high availability.
task_titles: Optimize system uptime and reliability constraints

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should encrypt sensitive data.
The system should support mobile-friendly interfaces.
The system should maintain responsive performance under peak load.

stage_summaries.headline: Stage 1 establishes account and identity foundations
Stage 2 delivers user communications and alerting

risk_signals: Non-functional scope is substantial, so quality engineering should run in parallel with feature delivery.
3 high-complexity tasks sit on the roadmap and deserve early prototyping.

committee_brief.scope_assessment: Scope includes 6 functional task(s) and 4 non-functional task(s); 0 task(s) sit outside the confirmed baseline because they are optional or low-confidence.

Coordination hotspot: Implement online payments handling workflow blocks 1 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 9 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. Effort breakdown: 240 estimated hours | FR: 120h | NFR: 120h.
